description: Two humanoid figures stand close together in an embrace or confrontation. They are draped in flowing orange-amber fabric or skin-like material. Their heads are featureless or obscured — smooth, dark, rounded forms with no visible faces. Between them, reddish organic matter or deteriorating tissue connects their upper bodies. Their hands hang down limply. The background is pale blue-grey. The overall effect is deeply unsettling, combining beauty and decay in Beksinski's characteristic surrealist-nightmare style.
